subject: Prevent parsing error due to format change for onap-helm
commit_message:
Prevent parsing error due to format change for onap-helm

Note the success criteria part shall be refactored
For the moment I keep as it is but it is too complex
As we plan to refactor onap-helm to include more detail
I do not do it here

Issue-ID: INT-1718

Signed-off-by: mrichomme <morgan.richomme@orange.com>
Change-Id: Ib93e0afca6b31571607bc0bd548b71a194f44c44

apparently the output of helm test leads to an exception that prevent to get the result on the daily master today
the success criteria management is uggly and shoul be unified in the future...meanwhile I just added a try/except to avoid stoping the xtesting processing

tested on the daily master

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

The try - except looks weird but if that's a subject for further refactoring then +1.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1
> 
> The try - except looks weird but if that's a subject for further refactoring then +1.

yes Sylvain is working on a new test with an html display and more details
this patch is temprary to get the onap-helm log but should be useless next week
Change has been successfully merged by Bartek Grzybowski
